title: com-four® 4x Ashtrays for outside - Windproof ashtray - Storm-ashtray with luminous lid - Car ashtray - Ashtrays for cigarettes - Smoking bin, Ø 8 cm (4 pieces - purple pink blue green)
features: WINDPROOF: The windproof ashtray is perfect for stormy weather because the tobacco ash is contained in the bucket. That helps to remove odors aswell!
VERSATILE: The car ashtray is suitable for indoors and outdoors, the car and the garden. It is easy to clean and the lid is removable!
GLOWING IN THE DARK: The storm ashtray has three notches for storing the cigarette. Thanks to the fluorescent lid, these can easily be found in the dark!
PRACTICAL: The car ashtray fits perfectly into the car cup holder. The cigarette butt falls reliably into the cup and unpleasant odours are reduced!
SCOPE OF SUPPLY: 4x Ashtrays (1x per colour) // Material: Plastic // Dimensions: Ø 8 x 11 cm // Colours: purple, red, blue, green
description: Car Ashtray Windproof in differrent colours - Anti-Smell Ashtray with removable lid - portable Ashtray for the car and the garden The perfect ashtray for all purposes! Whether outside on the terrace, in the flat or in the car, the windproof ashtrays are the absolutely right choice! The ashtrays are made of robust plastic, so the embers of a cigarette cannot bother you! Windproof: The windproof ashtray is perfect for stormy weather because the tobacco ash is contained in the bucket. That helps to remove odors aswell! Versatile: The car ashtray is perfect for indoor and outdoor use, in the car or in the garden. The cigarette ashtray is easy to clean and the lid is removable! Glowing in the dark: The storm ashtray has three notches for storing the cigarette. Thanks to the fluorescent lid, these can easily be found in the dark! Practical: The car ashtray fits perfectly into the car cup holder. The cigarette butt falls reliably into the cup and unpleasant odours are reduced! Product features: • Colours: purple, red, blue, green • Dimensions: Ø 8 x 11 cm • Material: Plastic Order now our practical storm ashtrays with luminous lid!
